name: FIGHTING PUDDING
short_description: Hotter Because He Was Devoured! The tragic revenge tale of Pudding, returned from hell! Wrongfully consumed, Pudding Guy now rises again. Defeat the guardians of hell and create the lover he always dreamed of! Only your ultimate control can reverse this unjust death. Now—begin the revenge!
detailed_description:
The Grudge of the Devoured Burns Hotter Than Hell!

Pudding Guy once dreamed of sweet love. But the moment he was eaten by humans, his dream was shattered.

Now awakened at the bottom of hell, only one thing remains: merciless revenge.

🔥 Game Features

  • Relentless Bullet Hell
    Can you endure attacks that come even from the background? Some cannot be blocked by shields!
    Keep your shield up and fly constantly to survive!

  • No Saves, Only Skill (Hardcore Experience)
    There is no save function in this game. Death means returning to the very beginning.
    Do not despair—through repeated challenges, your control will become sharper than ever.

  • Unique Guardians of Hell
    Each floor awaits with massive bosses. Break through their unpredictable patterns and feel the thrill of victory!

🚀 2.0 UPDATE: The Evolved Revenge System

  • Companions Appear: The lonely fight is over. Meet a reliable partner in hell and conquer the battlefield together.

  • Coin Shop & Ring System: Defeat enemies to collect coins. Buy powerful rings to customize Pudding’s abilities.

  • Strategic Power-Ups: Your equipment determines the difficulty of escaping hell. Build your own playstyle!

🏆 Challenge Toward the True Ending

Escaping hell is not the end. If you reach the ultimate peak and defeat the final boss,
the door to the “True Ending” that no one has ever seen will open.

Test your limits and fulfill Pudding Guy’s lost love.
Kick open the gates of hell now!

Developer’s Note: We actively reflected user feedback to balance difficulty and update systems. Painful yet addictive—enjoy the challenge!
